TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Corey_Brewer, title = Corey_Brewer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Corey_Brewer} }

S.FORM: Corey Brewer nalecuhan i Portland, Tennessee, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Corey Brewer i 2007 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 7, namapili' tu nu Minnesota Timberwolves putiput. 3 bulad 5 demiad, 1986 a mihca, Corey Brewer, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶or…ô br…ôw…ôr nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i portr~…æand, t…ônn…ôss…ô…ô, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶or…ô br…ôw…ôr i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ *, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu minn…ôsota timb…ôrwor~…æ*…ôs putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶or…ô br…ôw…ôr, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Corey Brewer nalecuhan i Portland, Tennessee, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Corey Brewer i 2007 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 7, namapili' tu nu Minnesota Timberwolves putiput. 3 bulad 5 demiad, 1986 a mihca, Corey Brewer, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶or…ô br…ôw…ôr nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i portr~…æand, t…ônn…ôss…ô…ô, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶or…ô br…ôw…ôr i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ *, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu minn…ôsota timb…ôrwor~…æ*…ôs putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶or…ô br…ôw…ôr, miunduaj.
